meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` AS 'C1',
SUM(`FB:History`.`Value`) AS 'C2'
FROM
`Data Visualization Definition` 
INNER JOIN (`FB:History` )
ON (`Data Visualization Definition`.`GUID` = `FB:History`.`Variable System ID`)
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Overdue_Incidents' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` > 'Service Target Warning') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` != 'Closed' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Cancelled' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Incidents_Met_SLA' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
((COUNT(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` = 'Service Targets Breached' THEN '1' END))*100/(COUNT(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status`!= null THEN '1' END))) AS percentMet
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000))
Having (COUNT(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status`!= null THEN '1' END)) > 0

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` AS C1,
SUM(`FB:History`.`Value`) AS C2
FROM
`Data Visualization Definition` 
INNER JOIN (`FB:History` )
ON (`Data Visualization Definition`.`GUID` = `FB:History`.`Variable System ID`)
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Reassigned_Incidents' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
AVG(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Group Transfers`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Group Transfers` > 0) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Select Column Name` AS C1
FROM
`Select Form Name` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate())) AS C1
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' 
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'Entry_ID',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS 'time'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Created,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenInc,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`='Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Critical,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Resolved,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date`!= null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Reopened,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Closed,
Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`)
Order By Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) ASC

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc,
CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved' THEN 'Open' ELSE  'Resolved' END as status
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup, status
ORDER BY AssignedGroup, status

SELECT DISTINCT
Count(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS Status,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS Priority,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` AS Assigned_Group
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
Group By Status,Priority,Assigned_Group

panels.title: Open incidents cross-tab - Priority and Status

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID` AS 'C1',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS 'Status',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS 'Priority',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` AS 'Assignee',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` AS 'Assigned_Support_Company'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS Status,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` AS Assigned_Group,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS Priority,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Company` AS Assigned_Support_Company
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
Group By Status,Assigned_Group,Priority,Assigned_Support_Company
